approved_by: human approval of E10 execution plan for Trust & platform maturity

input_snapshot.algorithm: sha256 over sorted per-file sha256 digests (excluding .DS_Store)

execution_metadata.note: Tool versions are an execution snapshot, not normative governance.

created_files: .env.example — template for Supabase, PostHog, Sentry, and Stripe environment variables.

apps/mobile/src/features/analytics/FakeAnalyticsService.ts — in-memory analytics service returning sample metrics.
apps/mobile/src/features/reviews/FakeReviewService.ts — in-memory review service using domain SubmitReview use case.
apps/mobile/src/features/reviews/useReviews.ts — hooks for loading and submitting reviews.
apps/mobile/src/features/verification/FakeVerificationService.ts — in-memory verification service using domain Verification value object.
apps/mobile/src/features/verification/screens/VerificationScreen.tsx — technician verification status and submission screen.
apps/mobile/src/services/AnalyticsService.ts — global analytics adapter port with console implementation.
apps/mobile/src/services/CrashReportingService.ts — global crash reporting adapter port with console implementation.

packages/domain/src/events/professional/ProfessionalVerified.ts — domain event emitted when a professional is verified.
packages/domain/src/use-cases/ApproveProfessionalVerification.ts — use case to approve a pending professional verification.
packages/domain/src/use-cases/GetReviewsForProfessional.ts — use case to list reviews for a professional.
packages/domain/src/use-cases/SubmitReview.ts — use case to submit a review for a completed booking and update the professional's rating.
packages/domain/src/value-objects/Verification.ts — immutable value object for professional verification documents and status.

apps/mobile/src/features/booking/screens/CustomerBookingDetailScreen.tsx — navigate to review screen when booking is closed.

packages/domain/src/events/index.ts — exported ProfessionalVerified event.
packages/domain/src/repositories/index.ts — exported InMemoryProfessionalRepository, ReviewRepository, and InMemoryReviewRepository.

packages/domain/src/value-objects/index.ts — exported Verification value object.

packages/types/src/enums/index.ts — added VerificationStatus, VerificationDocumentType, and AnalyticsEventType enums.

mutations.note: node_modules/ and .turbo/ directories are install/build artifacts and are not listed as authored mutations.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Verification is an immutable domain value object; Professional aggregate manages submission and approval through the existing ProfessionalStateMachine.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Keeps verification logic pure and enforces that only pending verifications can be approved.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: ReviewDto and ReviewProps use ProfessionalId for revieweeId instead of UserId.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: A review is always about a professional; the typed ID prevents accidental assignment of a customer ID.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: FakeBookingService now exports a singleton bookingRepository used by FakeReviewService.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Allows the domain SubmitReview use case to enforce the completed-booking invariant against the same in-memory state used by the booking feature.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Console implementations under apps/mobile/src/services/; live PostHog/Sentry integration deferred.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Establishes the application-level port contract without adding external SDK dependencies or network calls in E10.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Added build step and a deterministic placeholder job (env example check).
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Lays the CI foundation for future bundle-size budgets, secret scanning, and E2E without requiring tools that need external configuration.

deviations_from_plan.deviation: ReviewDto.revieweeId changed from UserId to ProfessionalId.
deviations_from_plan.justification: The reviewee in TaskPRO is always a professional; using ProfessionalId is a domain accuracy improvement derived from DOM-001 and avoids unsafe casts.

exclusions: No live Stripe API calls or Stripe Connect onboarding.
No live PostHog/Sentry integration; console adapters only.
No real document upload or identity verification backend.
No new Supabase migrations or schema changes beyond E4.
No organization, location, team, or branch aggregates.
No changes to knowledge/ authored artifacts.
No changes to .synth/ governance primitives beyond this replay record, governance-0024, and the E10 expedition state projection.
No git commits, branches, tags, or pushes performed.
